description: Sloyd.ai delivers a fast, user-friendly way to create 3D models with minimal friction. Its subscription-based model is a standout feature, offering unlimited access without the hassle of coin systems. While it has some limitations in asset variety and advanced customization, it's an excellent tool for prototyping, educational use, and creative exploration. For anyone looking to dive into 3D without the steep learning curve, Sloyd is a smart, accessible choice.
author: Joe M.
pros: Sloyd.ai isn’t just another 3D generator—it’s a creative playground with no artificial limits. The subscription model makes it feel like the platform is on your side, encouraging exploration instead of restricting it. If you’re serious about 3D creation, this is a breath of fresh air.
cons: While Sloyd offers a growing library, it still lacks variety in niche or highly specialized models..
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best AI for 3d printing I found
description: it`s fun and productive. I try new stuff nearly every evening. Good news is, I`m getting better in telling the AI what I want and make it understand me
author: Andrea P.
pros: the customer service is great and I love the variety of options for making my 3d printings. I always try many options for one 3d printing
cons: The texts are badly converted into 3d, but that is the case with all AIs I have tested so far, so I have to live with it until AI learned it :)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience with Sloyd was disappointing. The models lacked the level of detail and anatomical accuracy I needed, especially for 3D-printed miniatures. The results were low quality despite multiple prompt adjustments, and key features like faces, hands, and clothing were poorly defined. I would not recommend this service and will not consider subscribing. I would appreciate if a refund could be issued, as the tool did not meet expectations for even basic model quality.
author: Sreedevi C.
pros: The interface is clean and easy to use, and the ability to quickly generate and customize base models is convenient for early-stage concept work. The browser-based workflow and fast exports are useful for rapid prototyping, especially for beginners or casual hobbyists.
cons: While Sloyd is a powerful tool for procedural modeling and quick customization, the main limitation I found was the lack of fine control over facial features, hand details, and overall anatomy—especially for miniatures that require high-resolution, realistic details. For characters like elves or barmaids, I often needed more precision than the platform currently allows. Additional options for posing and mesh refinement would really elevate the quality.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Honestly it is one of the most helpful tools that I use while game developing. I am glad that I found sloyd.ai.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Its pricing is so low for what i can do with sloyd.ai honestly. It is great for someone like me who is a newbie game developer but doesnt have much exp with 3d modeling
cons: It takes time creating some detailed assets. Most negative thing I would say is time efficency. And some of the models create problems while i try to rig them on blender. Those are the only issues
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great product, and even better (and VERY proactive) customer service!
description: Very good, and I'll continue to use Sloyd a lot! I love the possibilities and I really love the customer service!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: No AI slop. Because of the use of templates (I think), the structures created look good from the start and don't have odd slop around them. This may be somewhat limiting compared to "pure" AI, but I've not encountered any limits yet. I'm very pleased. Even more though, their customer service was great! I had some login/payment difficulties and ended up paying 4-5 times. [sensitive content hidden] at Sloyd was quick to email me to point this out and to ask if I was having any difficulties. He diagnosed the problem as my accidentally having two logins. He proposed a solution right away. It was great, and super-proactive!
cons: I'm not sure if the use of templates limits what I can make, but for me right now it is a net plus to not have junk slop AI coming out, which I usually have with Meshy or 3D AI Studio.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The new way to 3d print is here
description: Wonderful product, I enjoy that it is not point based system. So you can keep generating what you like as mush as you want.
author: Jeremy C.
pros: the correct generation of ideas from Text to 3d image. The constant flow and easy to learn process. Time of generation is not that long. the price is just right and this can be for new people starting out or experienced users wanting a edge.
cons: some edit features that are missing. smoothing surface, hollowing -mesh Boolean, not being able to re-generate the same image you created without having to type same info in again. *only text to 3d* not image editor.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am working in different projects whare I need to be able to quickly create 3D game assets an have gone through most of the different options currently out there. Sloyd stands out and is in the top range of the tools I have tried. Generation times are a factor in my workflow, and Sloyd is comparable to other high end tools in this respect, even though the current UX does not show progress when generating, making the wait feel a bit longer. Sloyd came to my attention a year ago when it used pre-made shapes in its generative models, and I am hoping they keep innovating in this field.
author: Klas H.
pros: Sloyd works different from other 3D generators and uses better geometry than its competitors. It is a very promising high-end generative tool.
cons: Texturing of objects generated from images can be a bit rough around the edges still, giving strange results at times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The new way to get 3D objects in the industry
description: Is awesome, they really curated everything and keep updating all with new stuff and I really don't need to go out or to really search in other place for some simple forms or placeholders than could not be only place holders
author: Ian P.
pros: Is awesome, they keep updating and giving support to all and have a nice community focused on improvement and helping each other
cons: They keep pushing new updates, not all fix all the issues but try to do there best, even then they make wrong, there fix it in little time :D also it a paid software, not so steep, but there is, not that it doesn't deserve it, but it is a point to consider
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Philipp G.
pros: It works quite well and they have an amazing customer support. The quality of the 3d models was very good such that I could even make a print with a 3D printer. I like a lot the interface as well.
cons: I found the billing system which uses an external service slightly confusing, as I accidentally used two different mail addresses, but that has nothing to do with the actual app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good concept, still room to improve
description: I think the experience was average, I have tried to build a 3D model to 3D print, but I could not get close enough shape without actual advanced 3d modeling.
author: Laurian L.
pros: I like the concept to go from an written idea to a 3d prototype without knowledge of 3d modeling. And I love that it exposes an API.
cons: I think the learning curve of the interface is a bit steep and in the 3D templates there are two many weapons in my opinion.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mike M.

author: Utsav M.

cons: The UI was clunky to begin with but it keeps improving.

review_title: omg i love it makes life soo much easier

cons: That it doesnt do biological life and such well.

author: David B.
pros: Love the product and could highly recommend it to anyone
cons: Nothing as we really like the product in terms of the functionality and features it has to offer

review_title: Innovative 3D Creation Made Accessible by Sloyd
description: Sloyd has taken by journey of 3D creation and AI generation to next level. The platform's innovative tools have empowered my design process, allowing for intricate modeling with relative ease. Despite the initial learning curve, the user-friendly interface and supportive tutorials have guided me through, leading to a rewarding experience. It's a game-changer for creators looking to bring their visions to life through 3D and generative AI.
author: Mahendra T.
pros: User-friendly tools , rapid development of game environments and virtual worlds. Machine learning integration for smart, efficient asset generation. Strong support community and resource availability.
cons: The complexity involved for users who may not be familiar with 3D creation tools. While the platform is innovative and empowering for creators, there could be a steep learning curve for those new to 3D modeling and design. Ensuring user-friendly interfaces and robust tutorials or support for beginners might be an area of improvement to make it more accessible to all skill levels.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Crafting Creativity and Tradition with Modern Technology
description: Sloyd is a form of manual education that focuses on hands-on learning through craft projects and manual work. It is used to teach practical skills, foster creativity, develop manual dexterity, and promote self-expression through craftsmanship. Additionally, Sloyd can serve as a therapeutic and relaxing activity, helping to reduce stress and improve concentration. In summary, Sloyd is used as an educational and recreational tool to learn practical skills, foster creativity, and enjoy traditional craftsmanship.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I like most about Sloyd is its focus on hands-on learning and creativity. This practice promotes manual and artistic skills while preserving traditional craftsmanship and cultural heritage. The sense of accomplishment in completing a Sloyd project and the opportunity to express creativity through crafts make this activity rewarding and enriching for those who engage in it.
cons: Some potential drawbacks of Sloyd include the time-consuming nature of projects, the need for ample space and tools, the complexity of certain techniques, and the risk of injury when working with sharp tools. These factors may pose challenges for individuals seeking quick results, facing resource limitations, dealing with intricate tasks, or prioritizing safety precautions in their crafting endeavors.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Mesh Generation is a reach for what Sloyd does
description: Attempting to use this tool in a production ready game project would severely limit my creativity. I would need to work around the lack of specific models this tool can "generate" to build my game. I found far better results, cheaper and faster by simply browsing my game engine's preferred asset store for what I was looking for.
author: Michael K.
pros: There's a library of extremely basic low poly models to use as placeholders in your game.
cons: The mesh generation is lackluster at best, a blatant lie at worst. Generating a model is more like searching their library for keywords, allowing the AI to select a model that matches the best, then randomizing a few properties on the model. It doesn't seem like this tool is using any actual AI at all beyond translating your text prompt into predefined properties.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An innovative tool that brings creativity and visualization to Life
author: Samuele C.
pros: One of the standout features of Sloyd.ai 3D Generator is its ease of use. Even for those with limited experience in 3D modeling, the tool provides a user-friendly environment where they can quickly bring their ideas to life. From architectural designs to product prototypes, the possibilities are virtually limitless.
cons: Learning Curve: Some users might find the initial learning curve for Sloyd to be a bit steep, especially if they are not familiar with project management tools or AI-driven platforms. Providing more comprehensive onboarding resources could help mitigate this challenge.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Its great and easy to use

pros: Easy to use and intuitiveEasy to use Intuitive interface High quality results Streamlines design process Rapid prototyping Enhances creativity Saves time User-friendly controls Versatile applications Inspires innovation
cons: Limited complexity Inability to create intricate shapes Difficulty with detailed scenes Lacks human-like generation Limited realism
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I think this product will be very cool to be integrated with other platforms. I don't see how a user or developer using it that much for the price. But I know that big platforms could partner with you to provide it to customers for free. I refer to metaverse platforms and so on.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - The models are very lightweight, which is great for use in low-poly games. - Model generation is very fast. - Intuitive interface and simplified export.
cons: - There could be a button to reset the value of each slide to the original value. - Very limited and poorly customizable material options. - It should be possible to preview the materials. - Select where objects will spawn. - Explanation of what each slide changes. - Possibility to create typography (signs).
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easy and fun AI 3D Object generator
description: i was just browsing the internet to see how 3D objects AI generation was. Then I stumbled on sloyd and decided to give it a shot. I was so impressed that I share the website with a few of my students on th same day. They were also very impressed and some of them became users immediately. I'm using the free version as a tryout but I am very impressed by its generative capabilities. Even the hallucinations can be fun to use.
author: Nikolas Z.
pros: Very easy to use and to export the 3D images. I had fun doing it and already shared with some of my friends and students. The UI is intuitive and the menu for adjustments is pretty neat.
cons: Low resolution of the 3D images. But I am on the free plan so, cannot complain much about it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Awan S.
pros: All of the sloyd is very very nice. Helps my job, make it easier.
cons: Nothing I can think of at the moment, It seems good.
